groundingDensity: moderate and pressure-protective - the pass added Eastweald road texture, relay politics, Stratholme logistics, and object-contact detail while keeping the chapter's briefing cadence clipped and mobile

scenes.title: Road and first briefing
focus: King's Road, Eastweald, orchard, wagon, hedge, and Darrowshire roadside texture to keep the chapter in living Lordaeron instead of abstract transit
Andorhal grain mechanism translated into road-usable language for Sylvanas without slipping into report-speak
Cyndia's left-flank discipline and right-side absence checks carried into the ride geometry

scenes.title: Scholomance route comparison and Kel'Thuzad's return
focus: Jandice Barov's curated route contrasted against Sylvanas's stock-room path through brass drawers, opened villagers, and stitched parts
Kel'Thuzad's survival plan grounded as a personal vessel and return claim rather than abstract necromantic jargon
subtext preserved by leaving the study wound in dialogue pressure instead of explanation

scenes.title: Silvermoon and Dalaran vise
focus: Lor'themar relay enriched with Convocation, Sunstrider throne, Rommath, Saltheril, Runestones of Quel'Thalas, and Eversong-border politics
Antonidas call grounded through mithril filigree, Violet Citadel context, Council of Six pressure, and restricted-archives memory
food-distribution targets sharpened to granaries, guild bakehouses, and holding yards without pausing for lore exposition

scenes.title: Courier, Stratholme triage, and southward run
focus: Hearthglen relay grounded through Lordaeron field detail, Uther, Silver Hand cavalry, First Legion, and Captain Falric
Stratholme attack plan reframed as market, baker's quarter, warehouse-lane routing under time pressure
final ride kept lean while deepening bells, windows, smoke, horse lather, and road-darkening texture

constraintsObeyed.antiBloat: The road briefing stayed mobile and pressure-driven; added specificity came through substitutions, route nouns, and contact moments rather than expanded explanation blocks.
constraintsObeyed.antiWiki: No lore paragraphs were inserted. Every proper noun enters through live briefing, relay traffic, or Jaina's immediate tactical reasoning.
constraintsObeyed.pov: All narration remains inside Jaina's operational, emotionally split, institutionally literate lens.
constraintsObeyed.subtext: Jaina's omission about the study remains in the gap between what she says aloud and what Sylvanas hears.

auditResults.overGrounding: none detected - additions stayed on route, relay, food-distribution, and contact-surface nouns
